title: Uruguayan Split Pea Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew from Uruguay, made with split peas, savory beef, and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cubed beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the split peas, savory, chili powder, salt, and pepper.
Stir to combine and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes, or until the peas are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
